english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
We must think about how we choose what is good. We want to do things that make life better for people. But we have a hard problem when we must choose between many people. We must decide which person to help and how much help they need. This is a hard thing to do because we cannot help everyone at the same time. We have only so much time and so much stuff to give.

The hard question is how to know how much a person is needed when we must choose. If we have one piece of food and two people feel a great need for food, who gets it? If one person is a child and one person is an old man, who should we help? Some people think we should look at how much good feeling a person can feel in the time they have left. They might say we should help the child because the child has many years of life ahead. They want to make the most good for the most people. This way of thinking says we should count all the good feelings in the world put together.

Other people think this is not the right way. They think every person is special and has the same right to be happy. They say we should not count people like they are just numbers. They might say we should follow a set of ways to act that are always right, no matter what happens later. For them, doing the right thing means following what is right in the moment, even if it does not lead to the most good feelings for everyone. They believe that some things are always good or always bad, and we must not change those things just to get a better end.

There are also people who think we should look at what each person has already done. They might think a person who helps others should get more help than a person who hurts others. This is a different way of looking at what is good. It looks at the person and what they are like. This makes things very hard because it is not easy to know what is really inside a person. We might be wrong about who is good and who is bad. This means we could end up helping the wrong people or hurting the right people. All these ways of thinking show how hard it is to decide what is really the best way to live and act.

Second, we look at the second thing, which is having a strong reason to believe something. This is when we see many things that point to one way of thinking. For one way to see this, if we see dark clouds and feel the wind, we might think rain is coming. We do not know for sure that rain will fall, because the wind could stop and the clouds could go away. However, the things we see give us a very good reason to think rain will happen. Third, we see how these two things are not the same. The first thing is about what is true in all ways and at all times. The second thing is about what will most often happen resting on what we see now. The way they are not the same is that the second thing can be wrong even if the reasons were good, but the first thing cannot be wrong because it is the truth. Finally, we can say that the first thing is a state of being that cannot change, while the second thing is a way of thinking that helps us move through the world even when we do not see everything.

english_query: Which axiom of probability is violated by the probabilities on the parchment?
ugf_response: First, we look at the main ways we count chance. One way says the number must be between nothing and one. Another way says that if you add up the chances for every thing that can happen, the answer must be one. If the paper shows numbers that do not add up to one, this way is broken. This means the whole group of chances is not right. So, the problem is that the adding up part is wrong. The part that is broken is the one that says all chances must add up to one.

english_query: If the engine has fuel, then the car can move. If the car can move, then the room is bright. Therefore, if the engine has fuel, then the room is bright. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the engine has the food for it, then the car can go. Next, we look at the second idea. It says that if the car can go, then the room is bright. Now we put these two ideas together. If the engine has the food for it, the car goes. If the car goes, the room gets bright. So, if we start with the engine having the food for it, we end up with the room being bright. The path goes from the food for the engine to the car going to the room being bright. So the last idea says that if the engine has the food for it, the room is bright. This fits the path we just built. We can imagine a story where the engine has the food for it. In this story, the car goes. Because the car goes, the room is bright. There is no way for the engine to have the food for it and for the room to stay dark, given these two ideas. So the last idea must be true if the first two are true. follows

english_query: how to decide when the right thing to do is not clear
ugf_response: First, we must look at the things that will happen if we do one thing. We must look at the things that will happen if we do another thing. We look at how these things will make people feel good or feel bad. Second, we think about what we must do because it is the right way to be. This means thinking about what we would want everyone else to do in the same way. Third, we look at what we can know for sure and what is only a guess. We must be careful not to let our own ways of seeing things change what is true. The thing after the third thing, we look at the people who will be hurt or helped by what we choose to do. We try to find a way to make the most good for the most people. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we take all these things and put them together in our heads. We put the good on one side and the bad on the other side to see which is bigger, and we put what we must do against what we want to do. Finally, we choose the path that does the most good and causes the least hurt, while staying true to what is right.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We want to know what will happen in the future. To do this, we look at what has happened before. We look at the past to see how things move and change. We think that if something happened many times before, it will happen again in the same way. This is how we try to guess what is coming next.

But there is a big problem with this way of thinking. The problem is that the past does not show us everything. Just because things were one way before does not mean they must stay that way. The world is always changing. New things can come into being that were never there before. These new things can change how everything works.

Imagine you are watching a man walk down a road. You see him walk for ten minutes. You see him go forward in a straight line. You think to yourself that he will keep going in that same straight line. You use what you saw to guess what he will do next. But then, something new happens. A big hole appears in the ground. The man must stop or turn. The hole was not there when you were watching him. Because the hole is new, your guess about his path was wrong.

The past can tell us about things that are already here. It can tell us how things act when things stay the same. But the past cannot tell us about things that have not happened yet. It cannot tell us about a time when the world becomes different. If we only look at what was, we might not be able to see what could be. We might think we know the way, but we are only looking at a road that is no longer there. This makes it very hard to be sure about what will come.

english_query: the problem of everyone using up something that belongs to all
ugf_response: First, we look at a thing that belongs to every person at the same time. This thing is not owned by one person alone, but everyone can use it. Second, we see that when one person uses this thing, there is less of it left for the people who come after. Third, we think about what happens when many people want to use the same thing at the same time. Each person wants to take as much as they can because they do not want to lose it to someone else. The step after the third step shows that if every person thinks this way, the thing will be gone very fast. The step after that shows that the thing will be used up before it can grow back or stay good for the long time. This is a bad thing because once the thing is gone, no one can use it anymore. This shows why it is hard to take care of things that belong to everyone.

english_query: If he turns on the light, then the room is bright. He does not turn on the light. Therefore, the room is not bright. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if he turns on the light, then the room is bright. This tells us what happens when the thing that makes light is on. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that he does not turn on the light. Now we must ask if this means the room is not bright. We know what happens when the light is on, but we do not know what happens when the light is off. Maybe there is a window that lets in sun. Maybe there is a fire in a box that gives light. Maybe the room is always bright for some other reason. The first idea does not say that the light is the only way to make the room bright. It just says that turning on the light makes it bright. So, it is possible that he does not turn on the light, but the room is still bright because of the sun. Since we can imagine a story where the first two ideas are true but the last idea is not true, the last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who tells you a story about why they did a thing. They tell you what they did and why they say they did it. But you might think that they are not telling you everything. You might think there are other parts of the story that they are keeping inside their head. These are the hidden parts. They might be things that make them look bad or things that make them feel bad.

The hard question is how can you know what is in their head in a way that is the very same as what is real when they do not tell you? You cannot go inside their mind and see the truth. You can only listen to the words they say. This makes it hard to know if the story they tell you is the whole story or just a small part of it.

Some people might say you should look at what the person does instead of what they say. They think that if a person says one thing but does another, the thing they do is the real thing. If a person says they love someone but they act mean to that person, the mean acts tell you the real story. They look for the way a person acts to find the hidden parts.

Other people might say you should look at the world around the person. They look at the things that happened to the person before they did the thing. They think that if we know what happened in the past, we can guess what is in the head of the person now. They look for ways that things happen over and over in the same way.

Third, some people might think you can only know the truth by asking more and more questions. They think that if you keep asking, the person will at some time say something that does not fit their first story. When the story breaks, the hidden parts might come out. But this is hard because people are very good at making up stories that sound good.

english_query: Also, the soul, which is the air of living, is in all of the body, and most in the heart. So it was not right to say: 'He blew into his face the air of living.'
ugf_response: Since the acts of life are more clearly seen in the face of a human, because of the senses that show there; so the books about god say that the air of living was blown into the face of a human.

Because an old teacher said good people do big signs sometimes by asking for help, sometimes by their own power. english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks about who they are. Most people believe that their heart and their mind make them who they are, and that what they do is just a way to show that. They think that if they are a kind person, they will do kind things. Then, we must look at the other way of thinking. This way says that what a person does is what makes them who they are. If a person does kind things every day, they will start to see themselves as a kind person. We can see this by looking at how our bodies and minds work. When we do something many times, it becomes easy and we do it without thinking. This makes the thing we do part of us. We can also see that when we change our ways of acting, our thoughts begin to change to be the same as our new ways. To show this, if a person who thinks they do not want to work starts to work hard every day, their mind will slowly change to say they are a hard worker. This happens because the mind wants what we do and what we think to be the same. Finally, we see that by choosing new things to do, a person can build a new way of being. By changing the small things they do, they change the big thing that is their life.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we think about how people live together in a group. Second, we see that if one person hurts another person to get what they want, the group will break into pieces. Third, we look at what happens if we say it is okay to hurt someone if it helps many other people. We see that this way of thinking makes everyone feel afraid because no one is safe. The thing after the third thing, we see that if we want to live in a world where we are all free and can make our own choices, we must say that some things are always wrong. The thing after that, we see that if we do not have these things that are always wrong, then no one has a real way to live well. The thing after that, we see that we must act toward each person as a thing that is very great in its own way and not just as a thing to be used to get what we want. This is how we keep the world from becoming a place of fear and pain.

But what he made is not the same size as him, since he is without end and what he made has an end; and there is no way to fit what has an end with what does not. So, since we cannot show a maker by looking at what he made if they are not the same size, it seems we cannot show that god is there.
ugf_response: We cannot get full knowing of the maker by looking at what he made if they are not the same size. But from every thing made we can clearly show that the maker is there, and so we can show that god is there by looking at what he made; though by them we cannot know god as he really is.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response:
The person wants to tell how to know if one thing must happen because of another thing. The first idea is that we have a set of things that we know are true. The second idea is that we have a way of moving from those true things to a new thing. The third idea is the question of whether the new thing must be true if the first things are true.

To look at this, we first see what they say is true. They say that we start with some things that are real and not wrong. These are the things we take as our starting point. The next part is what they think follows. They think that if we use a certain way of thinking, we can find a new thing. This new thing is what comes after the first things. They believe that if the first things are true, and if the way we move between them is good, then the new thing must also be true.

Now we must see if the thinking is good. To see if the thinking is good, we must look at the way they move from the first things to the new thing. If the way they move is such that it is not possible for the first things to be true and the new thing to be not true, then the thinking is good. If there is a way for the first things to be true but the new thing to be wrong, then the thinking is not good. We must check if the path they take is strong and has no parts that can break or if it has holes that let wrong things through.

english_query: Also, the thinking soul is better than the stuff that makes up bodies. But God made that stuff with shapes it can take. So much more did God make the thinking soul with ideas it can know. And so the soul knows body things by ideas it has from the start.

So the thing that makes life comes from the true stuff of the parent.

The good way of a woman, if you wish to know about that, may also be easily said: her job is to order her home, and keep what is inside, and do what her husband says. english_query: what it means to really know a thing and not just believe it
ugf_response: First, we look at the word believe. This is when we feel something is true in our hearts or minds, even if we do not have strong signs. It is like a guess that we hold onto. Then we look at the word know. This is not the same. To really know a thing, we need more than just a feeling. We need to see it with our eyes or hear it from someone we trust very much. We also need to be sure that the thing is actually true and not just a dream or a lie. Next, we think about why this change in meaning matters. If we only believe, we might be wrong. But if we know, we are right. This means that knowing is a stronger state of mind than believing. Finally, we see that to go from believing to knowing, we need to check the facts. We need to look at the world and see if our belief fits what is really there. When our belief fits the real world, then we can say we know the thing.

ugf_response: Good! yes; but wait a bit and hear me talk, and then you will say it with more reason; because to think true is good and to be made not true is bad.

english_query: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
ugf_response: First, we look at what a reason is. A reason is a cause for us to think something is true or to do something. Then we think about a good reason. A good reason is one that makes it very hard to say no. It is like a big rock that holds up a wall. If you have a good reason, most people will agree with you because the reason is clear and true. Next, we look at a bad reason. A bad reason is like a small stick from a tree. It does not hold much weight. If you have a bad reason, people can easily find a way to say it is not good enough. They might say the reason is not true or not important. This means the way a good reason is different from a bad reason is in how well the reason helps your idea. A good reason gives you a good chance of being right. A bad reason gives you a bad chance. Finally, we see that if we want to change the mind of another person, we need good reasons, not bad ones.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Person 1: How can I know if someone is changing what was really said?

Person 2: You need to look for signs that the new words do not fit the true facts.

Person 1: What are some signs I should look for?

Person 2: First, see if the new words make the speaker look better than they did before.

Person 1: So if they make themselves look good, they might be lying?

Person 2: Yes, often they change the story to hide a bad thing they did.

Person 1: What if they do not make themselves look better?

Person 2: Then check if the new words are very different from the old ones.

Person 1: How do I know if they are different enough?

Person 2: Ask if the main point has changed. If the main point is new, they changed it.

Person 1: That helps. Is there anything else?

Person 2: Yes, watch their face and voice. If they act like they are scared or not calm, they may be hiding the truth.

Person 1: So I should look at their words, what they want to do, and their feelings?

Person 2: Exactly. All three things can tell you if they are changing the story.

english_query: Also, god does nothing unless he wants it. But wanting something to happen is not the same as wanting it to be good. So doing things should not be part of wanting them to happen.
ugf_response: Just as we can say in a way that is not right that god wants things he does not really want; so we can say in a way that is not right that god wants what he does, even if he really wants it. So nothing stops the same thing from being what he wants to be good and what he wants to happen. But doing is always the same as wanting it to be good; while telling others what to do or giving ideas are not; this is because doing is about now, while telling and giving ideas are about later; and also because doing is the thing that comes from wanting, while telling and giving ideas are things that come through others.

english_query: how two things happening together does not mean one causes the other
ugf_response:
Sometimes two things happen at the same time. When this happens, people often think that the first thing makes the second thing happen. But this is not always true. To understand why, we must look at how things work in the world.

First, let us look at an idea. Imagine that every time a man carries a thing to keep him dry from the water in the sky, it starts to rain. If the man only looks at these two things, he might think that the thing to keep him dry makes the rain come down from the sky. He might think that if he carries it, he can make the rain happen. But we know this is not how the world works. The thing to keep him dry does not make the rain. Instead, a third thing is happening. The clouds are full of water and the air is changing. This third thing makes both the rain and the man to take his thing to keep him dry. The rain and the thing to keep him dry are together, but one does not make the other happen.

Second, let us look at another way things can be together. Sometimes two things happen together just by chance. If you throw a small round metal thing that has two sides and you see it land on its side, and at that same time a bird flies past your window, you might think they are part of the same thing. This happened once, and then it happened again. It might feel like the small round metal thing makes the bird fly. But there is no way the metal thing can tell the bird what to do. It is just a thing that happened twice by a thing that was not planned.

Third, we must see that sometimes one thing does make another thing happen, but we must be careful to find out which one is the start. If you see a person who is happy and a person who is eating good food, you might think the food makes the person happy. This is often true. But it could also be that a person who is already happy feels like eating good food. In this case, the happy feeling comes first and makes the eating happen.

To know if one thing makes another thing happen, we cannot just look at them being together. We must find a way to see if changing the first thing will change the second thing. We must make sure no other thing is hiding in the middle to make them both happen. We must be very careful when we say that one thing is the cause of another.

english_query: If the meeting starts at noon, then everyone arrives before noon. If everyone arrives before noon, then she woke up. Therefore, if the meeting starts at noon, then she woke up. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the meeting begins at the middle of the day, then all people get there before that time. Next, we look at the second idea. It says that if all people get there before that time, then she got out of bed. We can put these two together. If the meeting starts at the middle of the day, the first idea tells us everyone arrives early. If everyone arrives early, the second idea tells us she got out of bed. So, if the meeting starts at the middle of the day, she must have got out of bed. The last thing we read fits this line of thought. It follows for sure. follows
